body_html:
can't we use someone else... it smells

--- TheStrategyGroup@aol.com wrote:

Kevin Patrick is the water consultant Gideon wants
to hire for this deal.

Kevin Patrick represented the Ranch I though Ranch
IV entities in a dispute
with Jelinek. Kevin does not know that LHW will
beneficially own the
purchaser of Jelinek's ranch. Gideon told Kevin
Patrick only that the purchaser of
Jelinek's ranch is a friend of LHW, which is why
Kevin Patrick has asked for
a conflict waiver.

One potential issue I can think of is possibility of
less than full
disclosure about Jelinek's rights in mistaken belief
that purchaser, although friends
with LHW, might ultimately become adverse to Two
Shoes.

Any thoughts?

Darren

Subject: Consent and Disclosure Jelinek Ranch
